title: OutcomeReflection Input
description: Validated inputs for outcome-reflection skill execution

taskId.description: The task ID to reflect on (must correspond to a completed task)

agentType.description: The agent type that executed the task (e.g., developer, planner, architect)

taskType.description: Category of task for trend analysis grouping

predictions.description: Predicted outcomes recorded at task creation time

estimatedTokens.description: Estimated token count for the task

estimatedFiles.description: Estimated number of files to be modified

predictedOutcome.description: Qualitative description of expected task outcome

actuals.description: Actual outcomes observed after task completion

actualOutcome.description: Qualitative description of actual task outcome

actualBlockers.description: Blockers that actually occurred during execution

reworkLoops.description: Number of rework loops required (0 = smooth execution)

mode.description: Operation mode: reflect (single task), analyze (compute scores), trend (multi-task trend)
